Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=[trehalose-6-phosphate synthase]-L-cysteine + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = [trehalose-6-phosphate synthase]-S-methyl-L-cysteine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:46808, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11665, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11666, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:29950, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:82612; EC=2.1.1.318; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:24412193};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: S-adenosyl-L-methionine-dependent protein-cysteine S-methyltransferase with broad substrate specificity. Methylates trehalose-6-phosphate synthase (TPS), enhancing its enzymatic activity and promoting trehalose synthesis upon entry of cells into stationary phase. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:24412193}.
